summary: Core inspection flow complete with room item picker, AI vision, PDF generation, and special cards. Tap-driven design throughout to minimise inspector input time.
techStack: React 18 + Vite 5 PWA, React Router v7, Tailwind CSS v3, Dexie.js v4, jsPDF, Claude Haiku 4.5, Nominatim, Web Speech API
recentChanges: Room item picker: 2-col tap-to-add grid on first room visit, Let's Go seeds items
Keys section: card grid with count tracking
Special rooms: dedicated layouts, 1 photo min, no AI
PDF: one room per page, special card photos embedded
Google Maps key added to Vercel (pending GCloud config)
blockers: Google Maps Places: needs GCloud billing + referrer config
Anthropic key needs server-side proxy before production
nextSteps: Add custom item input to picker grid
